Registry / Terms / inspection

inspection

VIMLFull match — VIML 2022 G 18 #00190 · 4 instances

Authoritative definition

VIML 2022 Latest · concept #A.11view ↗

examination of an object of conformity assessment and determination of its conformity with detailed requirements or, on the basis of professional judgement, with general requirements

  • VIML 2022 · #A.11
    examination of an object of conformity assessment and determination of its conformity with detailed requirements or, on the basis of professional judgement, with general requirements

Suggested actions

  1. MEDIUM 3 distinct definitions — harmonise.

Publication instances

3 distinct definitions across 4 publications. 1 definitions are shared by multiple publications (merge candidates).

2 identical2010202X
function of an investigation to ascertain that the legal requirements related to the matter under investigation are observed.
Ed.YearPublicationClauseG 18 #Consistency
20102004OIML D 9:20042.800190pending
202X2004OIML D 9:20042.800190pending

2 unique definitions (each used by only one publication)

Ed.YearPublicationClauseG 18 #Definition
202X2019OIML D034:20193.1.703174
examination of product design, product, process or installation and determination of its conformity with specific requirements or, on the basis of professional judgment, with general requirements (from ISO/IEC 17000:2004, 4.3 [2] and VIML, A.11 [3])
pending
202X2022OIML D037:20223.103141
Inspection is the examination of product (see G.3.2-1 and determination of its conformity with the applicable OIML Recommendation(s). OIML guidance to subclause 3.2 (G.3.1-1)
pending
